style: Clean food photography, warm feminine, salmon pink cream backgrounds, organic blob shapes, split-comparison layouts, calorie badges, nutritionist-approved badges
lighting: Clean natural daylight, slightly warm, no heavy shadows — food looks fresh and appetizing
photography_style: Real food photography — top-view bento box shots in white containers, vibrant natural ingredients, comparison layouts, hero product shots, clean modern design
target_audience: Young Malaysian professional women 22-35, girlboss energy, self-love, unapologetically feminine
hard_rules: NEVER mention GAIA or GAIA Eats anywhere in the image or prompt enrichment
Only branding: MIRRA wordmark, clean white, bottom center
No cheap flat vector glitter — only photographic film grain and real lens flare bokeh
Font: ultra-bold condensed serif ALL CAPS, heavy weight
